name: edge_ordering
description: Buffered graph encode MUST order edges by source ID then target ID (SPEC 16.1), regardless of the order edges are provided. Input edges are scrambled (D->A, B->C, B->A); the encoder emits them sorted by (source ID, target ID): B->A (@0<@1), B->C (@2<@1), D->A (@0<@3). Edge reordering is decode-invariant and does not affect pack_root (which sorts edge records independently).
